TAUCETI-VERDICT-582aab30b6936b0b626b26a9
{"verdict":"request_changes","summary":"One public prelude helper creates a parallel path-connectedness API instead of using the existing `JoinedIn` extraction API directly.","findings":[{"file":"TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/UniversalCoverPrelude.lean","line":64,"issue":"`IsPathConnected.exists_path` is a public wrapper around the existing `IsPathConnected.joinedIn`/`JoinedIn.somePath` API, adding duplicate API surface for extracting a path with range in a path-connected set.","fix":"Remove this public theorem or keep it private to this development; at call sites, use `hU.joinedIn _ ha _ hb` together with `somePath` and `somePath_mem`.","evidence":"The theorem body itself is `let hab : JoinedIn U a b := hU.joinedIn _ ha _ hb; ⟨hab.somePath, Set.range_subset_iff.mpr hab.somePath_mem⟩`, so the existing API already supplies exactly the required data."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: One public prelude helper creates a parallel path-connectedness API instead of using the existing `JoinedIn` extraction API directly.

findings.issue: `IsPathConnected.exists_path` is a public wrapper around the existing `IsPathConnected.joinedIn`/`JoinedIn.somePath` API, adding duplicate API surface for extracting a path with range in a path-connected set.
findings.fix: Remove this public theorem or keep it private to this development; at call sites, use `hU.joinedIn _ ha _ hb` together with `somePath` and `somePath_mem`.
findings.evidence: The theorem body itself is `let hab : JoinedIn U a b := hU.joinedIn _ ha _ hb; ⟨hab.somePath, Set.range_subset_iff.mpr hab.somePath_mem⟩`, so the existing API already supplies exactly the required data.
